'''Torega''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Topa]] in the [[Sespe system/Legends|Sespe system]]. It was the location of [[White Ledge]], a hideout for [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] on the run. Torega was infested with [[wrix]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
